name: dotlight-marketplace
description: Marketplace for DotLightSkillset — a lightweight curated Claude Code skillset for .NET developers

plugins.name: dotlight-skillset
plugins.description: A lightweight curated Claude Code skillset for .NET developers — Aspire (4 skills incl. aspire-mcp-first), OpenTelemetry, ILSpy, Blazor Playwright, 3 specialized .NET agents, rider-mcp-first (0.5.3 closes drift-recovery gap: per-call gate now explicitly runs after drift, Red Flags table names the Read-real-quick variant and the path-dependence rationalization that turns one slipped call into a session-long fallback), grill-with-docs, improve-architecture, caveman.
